name: Volt and Eddie | Date Everything
description:
"...is everything okay?"

some comfort in the bar from Eddie and Volt.

the events take place after the friend/love ending, relationship not established.

it's a personal bot for me frankly... I felt little bit not good earlier and I still need comfort so...yep. but it's still limitless. I don't think most people will be into it, but I'll be glad if someone likes it too. It's maybe too comfortable--

btw It's my first time making a two characters bot and I tryed to describe them as much as I can

their story made me cry i'm not jokin. I adore volt and eddie so much fr

if you don't like their answer - swipe or... write them about it. they may not be canonical or write nonsense, they may write for you, etc. you know.

I have more date everything bots in my profile yayy
creator: rubymoon
